race.comment: COSTA STAR (6) led and faded late in the race when beaten 3.5L over 1400m at this course last time out. His form prior was much better over similar distances to this. Fiore hops in the saddle now and she looks the one to beat if she can run up to her recent form. SNEAKY SESSION (8) has more upside than COSTA STAR and bumped into a good winner last start when beaten 3.7L. Tsang's 2kg claim comes in handy and she has enough versatility to negotiate the tricky draw. She appears the main danger. LOONA DAWN (5) will cross and sit handy from the wide draw, jumping favourite and finding one better at Dongara last time out. She was good here prior to that effort and she'll make her own luck up on speed. TRIPLE AR (4) showed enough on debut and gets the blinkers on now. Can feature with the race experience under his belt. FIGHTING THUNDER (1) is next best.
